content:
Member-only story

AI

Money

Programming

Coding

Business

I didn’t set out to build a SaaS product. I was simply tired of repeating the same AI tasks every day summarizing meetings, writing emails, organizing research, and generating reports. What started as a personal productivity tool slowly evolved into something clients kept asking for. The surprising part? The technology wasn’t revolutionary. The workflow was.

5 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by Mohamed Nohassi on Unsplash1. I Was Using AI Every Day But I Was Still Doing Too Much Manual Work
When I first started using AI, I felt incredibly productive.
I’d ask it to write emails.
Summarize documents.
Generate blog posts.
Review code.
Explain error messages.
But after a few weeks, I noticed something strange.
I was still spending a huge amount of time copying and pasting.
Open ChatGPT.
